reviews.comment:
Un desastre parece que están de paro viernes 21hs 2 de moldeados en l oficina y unos solo atendiendo los surtidores esperando al lado de cada auto hasta que se llene

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster, it seems they're on strike. Friday 9pm, 2 of the molded ones in the office and only a few attending the pumps, waiting next to each car until it's full.

reviewReply.comment: Disculpe las molestias, nos ocuparemos del tema!! Gracias

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, vas, cargas (Utiliza las promos y asociate), tomas algo, calibras las cubiertas (no te olvides del auxilio), incluso le pegas una aspirada (;@) al auto!!!! Y salis como Franquito.
Vamos Neneeeeee!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! You go, fill up (take advantage of the promos and become a member), grab a drink, check your tire pressure (don't forget the spare), and even vacuum your car! And you leave feeling great!
Go, dude!
